notes: Core mechanics are solid with working invaders, shields, UFO, multi-level progression, and scoring, but the shield pixel rendering is slow (per-pixel fillRect loop) and the invader movement uses a fixed 10px step rather than smooth speed scaling, making gameplay feel slightly janky at higher levels.
Excellent implementation with destructible pixel shields and proper invader logic, though player/bullet movement is frame-dependent rather than time-based.

Core loop, shooting, enemies, shields, levels, pause and game over all exist, but controls/help text conflict on ESC, movement uses only lowercase a/d mapping via key values, and the presentation/game feel are solid but not close to a flawless Space Invaders recreation.
